title: Ohm's Law Calculator
description: Industrial-grade calculator for electrical power and resistance analysis, compliant with IEC 60038, ISO 50001, and Lean Six Sigma standards.

inputs.label: Voltage (V)
inputs.businessContext: Nominal voltage per IEC 60038. Typical industrial values: 230V single-phase, 400V three-phase.

businessContext_i18n.en: Nominal voltage per IEC 60038. Typical industrial values: 230V single-phase, 400V three-phase.
businessContext_i18n.tr: IEC 60038'e göre nominal voltaj. Tipik endüstriyel değerler: 230V tek fazlı, 400V üç fazlı.

inputs.label: Current (I)
inputs.businessContext: Load current in amperes. Used for conductor sizing and protection coordination.

businessContext_i18n.en: Load current in amperes. Used for conductor sizing and protection coordination.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Amper cinsinden yük akımı. İletken boyutlandırma ve koruma koordinasyonu için kullanılır.

inputs.label: Resistance (R)
inputs.businessContext: DC resistance or AC impedance at power frequency. Includes conductor, contact, and load resistance.

businessContext_i18n.en: DC resistance or AC impedance at power frequency. Includes conductor, contact, and load resistance.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Güç frekansında DC direnç veya AC empedans. İletken, temas ve yük direncini içerir.

inputs.label: Power Factor (cos φ)
inputs.businessContext: Ratio of real power to apparent power. Typical industrial loads: 0.8-1.0. Used for AC power calculations.

businessContext_i18n.en: Ratio of real power to apparent power. Typical industrial loads: 0.8-1.0. Used for AC power calculations.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gerçek gücün görünür güce oranı. Tipik endüstriyel yükler: 0,8-1,0. AC güç hesaplamaları için kullanılır.

inputs.label: Phase Type
inputs.businessContext: Single-phase or three-phase system. Affects power calculation formulas per IEC 60364.

businessContext_i18n.en: Single-phase or three-phase system. Affects power calculation formulas per IEC 60364.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tek fazlı veya üç fazlı sistem. IEC 60364'e göre güç hesaplama formüllerini etkiler.

inputs.label: Ambient Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Ambient temperature for resistance temperature correction. Copper conductor TCR = 0.00393 /°C.

businessContext_i18n.en: Ambient temperature for resistance temperature correction. Copper conductor TCR = 0.00393 /°C.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Direnç sıcaklık düzeltmesi için ortam sıcaklığı. Bakır iletken TCR = 0,00393 /°C.

rules.message: At least two of Voltage, Current, or Resistance must be provided. If all three are given, they must satisfy Ohm's Law within 5% tolerance.
Voltage, Current, and Resistance do not satisfy Ohm's Law within 5% tolerance. Check measurement accuracy.
Three-phase systems typically have power factor >= 0.6. Verify measurement.

thresholds.message: Current exceeds 100 A. Verify conductor ampacity per NEC Table 310.15(B)(16).
Voltage exceeds 1000 V. High-voltage safety procedures required per NFPA 70E.
Power factor below 0.7 indicates poor efficiency. Consider power factor correction capacitors.
Ambient temperature above 60°C may require derating of conductors per IEC 60364-5-52.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
